name: Hot & Cold Pressure Washing
description: Experience the best hot/cold pressure washing and soft washing services in Spokane, WA. Whether it's grease buildup or algae, our hot/cold pressure wash services use temperature-controlled water to tackle tough cleaning challenges efficiently and effectively.
shortDescription: Temperature-controlled pressure washing for tough stains, grease, and algae removal.
benefits: Removes deep-set grease and oil stains
Sanitizes surfaces with hot water
Restores original appearance
Safe for a variety of hard surfaces

name: Graffiti Removal
description: Restore the appearance of your property with our efficient graffiti removal services. We use specialized techniques to remove graffiti without damaging underlying surfaces. Trusted by the State of Washington.
shortDescription: State-certified, damage-free graffiti removal for commercial and public properties.
benefits: Rapid response to prevent copycats
No damage to the underlying masonry or paint
State-certified process
Complete removal without shadows or ghosting

name: Commercial Building & Storefront Washing
description: Make a lasting impression with sparkling clean building exteriors and storefronts. Our pressure washing services remove dirt, algae, and pollutants to restore the look of your property, attracting more customers.
shortDescription: Enhance your business's curb appeal with exterior and storefront pressure washing.
benefits: Improves curb appeal and attracts customers
Prevents mold and algae damage to exterior walls
Maintains property value
Creates a welcoming environment

name: Fuel Station Cleaning
description: Maintain a clean and safe environment at your fuel station with our comprehensive cleaning services. We target fuel spills, oil stains, and other contaminants for a high-quality result.
shortDescription: Targeted hot water pressure washing for gas stations, removing oil, gas, and grease.
benefits: Removes slip hazards from oil and grease
Enhances brand image and safety
Complies with environmental and safety standards
Hot water extraction for maximum clean

name: Driveway & Walkway Cleaning
description: Enhance the appearance and safety of your property with our driveway and walkway cleaning services. We remove oil stains, tire marks, dirt, mold, and mildew to keep these areas pristine and safe.
shortDescription: Restore flatwork by removing tire marks, oil stains, mold, and built-up dirt.
benefits: Eliminates slippery mold and mildew
Lifts deep oil and tire stains
Brightens concrete instantly
Prolongs the life of the surface

name: Headstone Cleaning
description: Our headstone cleaning service offers a respectful and thorough restoration, ensuring that the final resting places of loved ones are preserved with care and dignity.
shortDescription: Gentle, respectful, and effective cleaning for headstones and monuments.
benefits: Uses D/2 or specific gentle biological cleaners
No harsh pressure that damages aging stone
Removes lichen, mold, and environmental staining
Respectful and careful process

name: Roof Treatments & Soft Washing
description: Looking for professional hot/cold pressure washing and soft washing services in Spokane, WA? Our roof treatments safely remove moss, algae (Gloeocapsa magma), and debris without damaging your shingles.
shortDescription: Safe, low-pressure soft washing to remove moss and algae from your roof.
benefits: Extends the lifespan of your roof
Improves energy efficiency by removing heat-absorbing algae
Safe soft-wash method won't void warranties
Instant curb appeal boost

name: Drive-Through Cleaning
description: Experience top-notch hot/cold pressure washing and soft washing services in Spokane, WA. Our team guarantees thorough cleaning using high-quality products to remove heavy grease, oil, and food stains from high-traffic drive-through lanes.
shortDescription: High-temperature pressure washing for restaurant and bank drive-through lanes.
benefits: Eliminates heavy oil and grease buildup
Improves customer perception of cleanliness
Reduces slip hazards
Flexible scheduling to avoid business disruption

name: Outdoor Courts & Patios
description: Our team guarantees thorough cleaning using top-notch products for your outdoor living spaces and sports courts. We remove embedded dirt, moss, and mildew to prepare your surfaces for enjoyment.
shortDescription: Restore outdoor living areas, sports courts, and patios with professional cleaning.
benefits: Removes slip hazards from moss and algae
Restores vibrant colors to courts and pavers
Prepares surfaces for sealing or painting
Safe for delicate surfaces
